card.title: Programmatic Artworks
card.shortDescription: Computational artworks combining code, visuals, and sound.

page.fullDescription: In my programmatic-artworks, I leverage computational processes to generate artistic outcomes. Using code and programs, I create works that integrate visuals, sound, and interactivity at the intersection of technology and aesthetics.

card.title: Brodinsky-sur-Boue
card.shortDescription: Performance and installation work blending movement, sound, and visuals.

page.fullDescription: Brodinsky-sur-Boue explores embodied performance through audiovisual staging, connecting installation practices with iterative sonic experimentation.

card.title: Bridging the Gap with Myself
card.shortDescription: An introspective media project mixing code, sound, and installation.

page.fullDescription: Bridging the Gap with Myself examines identity through modular digital scenes, combining audiovisual fragments and algorithmic composition.

card.title: The Always Series
card.shortDescription: Data-driven audiovisual studies around repetition and memory.

page.fullDescription: The Always Series investigates loops, recurrence, and traces of memory through data-informed visual and sonic structures.

card.title: Childhood Paradise Reenacted
card.shortDescription: A memory-centered visual project built from synthetic and archival textures.

page.fullDescription: Childhood Paradise Reenacted reconstructs remembered landscapes through generative methods and visual transformations.

gallery.caption: Textural blend of archive and synthesis

card.title: A Glitch in the Ethics
card.shortDescription: Glitch-driven exploration of ethics, perception, and digital distortion.

page.fullDescription: A Glitch in the Ethics uses intentional system disruptions to probe responsibility, aesthetics, and algorithmic mediation.
